title: Social Media Post Transform Train Scene Into Vintage
sourceTitle: Social Media Post Transform Train Scene Into Vintage Diner

imagePrompts.prompt: Using the provided reference image, completely replace the train interior scene with a cozy vintage American diner counter interior. Remove the person, window reflection, thermos, book, and all train elements. Create a straight-on wide shot of a diner service counter with warm tungsten lighting, wood-paneled walls, a stainless-steel open kitchen, condiment bottles and a metal napkin dispenser on the counter, and a large black letterboard menu mounted above. The menu should have 6 sections labeled BREAKFAST, GRIDDLE, SANDWICHES, SIDES, DRINKS, and DAILY SPECIAL. Include these exact items and prices: BREAKFAST has 5 items: TWO EGGS TOAST 4.95, BACON & EGGS 6.50, HAM & EGGS 6.75, OMELET 7.25, BISCUITS & GRAVY 5.50. GRIDDLE has 4 items: SHORT STACK 4.25, PANCAKES 5.25, FRENCH TOAST 5.75, WAFFLE 5.95. SANDWICHES has 5 items: BLT 5.50, TUNA MELT 6.25, GRILLED CHEESE 4.50, CLUB SANDWICH 7.50, HAMBURGER 6.00. SIDES has 5 items: HASH BROWNS 2.50, BACON 2.95, SAUSAGE 2.95, TOAST 1.50, PIE 3.25. DRINKS has 5 items: COFFEE 1.25, TEA 1.25, MILK 1.50, ORANGE JUICE 1.75, SODA 1.50. DAILY SPECIAL has 1 item: CHICKEN FRIED STEAK 8.25. Make it look like a realistic photograph, slightly nostalgic, clean composition, no people.

promptTranslations.zh: 使用提供的参考图像，将火车内部场景完全替换为舒适的复古美式餐馆柜台内部。移除人物、窗户反射、保温瓶、书本和所有火车元素。设计一个餐馆服务柜台的正面广角镜头，采用温暖的钨丝灯光、木镶板墙壁、不锈钢开放式厨房、柜台上的调味瓶和金属餐巾架，上方安装一个大型黑色字母菜单板。菜单应分为6个部分，标题分别为BREAKFAST、GRIDDLE、SANDWICHES、SIDES、DRINKS和DAILY SPECIAL。包含以下确切项目和价格：BREAKFAST包含5项：TWO EGGS TOAST 4.95, BACON & EGGS 6.50, HAM & EGGS 6.75, OMELET 7.25, BISCUITS & GRAVY 5.50。GRIDDLE包含4项：SHORT STACK 4.25, PANCAKES 5.25, FRENCH TOAST 5.75, WAFFLE 5.95。SANDWICHES包含5项：BLT 5.50, TUNA MELT 6.25, GRILLED CHEESE 4.50, CLUB SANDWICH 7.50, HAMBURGER 6.00。SIDES包含5项：HASH BROWNS 2.50, BACON 2.95, SAUSAGE 2.95, TOAST 1.50, PIE 3.25。DRINKS包含5项：COFFEE 1.25, TEA 1.25, MILK 1.50, ORANGE JUICE 1.75, SODA 1.50。DAILY SPECIAL包含1项：CHICKEN FRIED STEAK 8.25。使其看起来像一张写实照片，略带怀旧感，构图干净，无人物。
promptTranslations.fr: En utilisant l'image de référence fournie, remplacez complètement la scène intérieure du train par l'intérieur d'un comptoir de diner américain vintage chaleureux. Supprimez la personne, le reflet de la fenêtre, le thermos, le livre et tous les éléments du train. Créez un plan large et direct d'un comptoir de service de diner avec un éclairage tungstène chaleureux, des murs lambrissés, une cuisine ouverte en acier inoxydable, des bouteilles de condiments et un distributeur de serviettes en métal sur le comptoir, et un grand menu à lettres noires monté au-dessus. Le menu doit comporter 6 sections intitulées BREAKFAST, GRIDDLE, SANDWICHES, SIDES, DRINKS et DAILY SPECIAL. Incluez ces articles exacts et prix : BREAKFAST a 5 articles : TWO EGGS TOAST 4.95, BACON & EGGS 6.50, HAM & EGGS 6.75, OMELET 7.25, BISCUITS & GRAVY 5.50. GRIDDLE a 4 articles : SHORT STACK 4.25, PANCAKES 5.25, FRENCH TOAST 5.75, WAFFLE 5.95. SANDWICHES a 5 articles : BLT 5.50, TUNA MELT 6.25, GRILLED CHEESE 4.50, CLUB SANDWICH 7.50, HAMBURGER 6.00. SIDES a 5 articles : HASH BROWNS 2.50, BACON 2.95, SAUSAGE 2.95, TOAST 1.50, PIE 3.25. DRINKS a 5 articles : COFFEE 1.25, TEA 1.25, MILK 1.50, ORANGE JUICE 1.75, SODA 1.50. DAILY SPECIAL a 1 article : CHICKEN FRIED STEAK 8.25. Faites en sorte que
promptTranslations.ru: Используя предоставленное референсное изображение, полностью замените интерьер поезда на уютную американскую винтажную закусочную. Уберите человека, отражения в окне, термос, книгу и все элементы поезда. Создайте широкоугольный снимок прямо перед стойкой обслуживания закусочной с теплым вольфрамовым освещением, деревянными панелями на стенах, открытой кухней из нержавеющей стали, бутылками с приправами и металлическим диспенсером для салфеток на стойке, а также большой черной доской с меню над стойкой. Меню должно состоять из 6 разделов с заголовками: BREAKFAST, GRIDDLE, SANDWICHES, SIDES, DRINKS и DAILY SPECIAL. Включите следующие пункты и цены: BREAKFAST (5 позиций): TWO EGGS TOAST 4.95, BACON & EGGS 6.50, HAM & EGGS 6.75, OMELET 7.25, BISCUITS & GRAVY 5.50. GRIDDLE (4 позиции): SHORT STACK 4.25, PANCAKES 5.25, FRENCH TOAST 5.75, WAFFLE 5.95. SANDWICHES (5 позиций): BLT 5.50, TUNA MELT 6.25, GRILLED CHEESE 4.50, CLUB SANDWICH 7.50, HAMBURGER 6.00. SIDES (5 позиций): HASH BROWNS 2.50, BACON 2.95, SAUSAGE 2.95, TOAST 1.50, PIE 3.25. DRINKS (5 позиций): COFFEE 1.25, TEA 1.25, MILK 1.50, ORANGE JUICE 1.75, SODA 1.50. DAILY SPECIAL (1 позиция): CHICKEN FRIED STEAK 8.25. Изображение должно выглядеть как реалистичная фотография, слегка ностальгическая, с чистой композицией и без людей.
promptTranslations.pt: Usando a imagem de referência fornecida, substitua completamente a cena do interior do trem por um interior de balcão de lanchonete americana vintage aconchegante. Remova a pessoa, o reflexo da janela, a garrafa térmica, o livro e todos os elementos do trem. Crie uma tomada ampla e direta de um balcão de atendimento de lanchonete com iluminação de tungstênio quente, paredes com painéis de madeira, uma cozinha aberta de aço inoxidável, frascos de condimentos e um dispensador de guardanapos de metal no balcão, e um grande menu de letras pretas montado acima. O menu deve ter 6 seções rotuladas BREAKFAST, GRIDDLE, SANDWICHES, SIDES, DRINKS e DAILY SPECIAL. Inclua estes itens exatos e preços: BREAKFAST tem 5 itens: TWO EGGS TOAST 4.95, BACON & EGGS 6.50, HAM & EGGS 6.75, OMELET 7.25, BISCUITS & GRAVY 5.50. GRIDDLE tem 4 itens: SHORT STACK 4.25, PANCAKES 5.25, FRENCH TOAST 5.75, WAFFLE 5.95. SANDWICHES tem 5 itens: BLT 5.50, TUNA MELT 6.25, GRILLED CHEESE 4.50, CLUB SANDWICH 7.50, HAMBURGER 6.00. SIDES tem 5 itens: HASH BROWNS 2.50, BACON 2.95, SAUSAGE 2.95, TOAST 1.50, PIE 3.25. DRINKS tem 5 itens: COFFEE 1.25, TEA 1.25, MILK 1.50, ORANGE JUICE 1.75, SODA 1.50. DAILY SPECIAL tem 1 item: CHICKEN FRIED STEAK 8.25. Faça parecer uma fotografia realista, levemente nostálgica, composição limpa, sem pessoas.
promptTranslations.ja: 提供された参照画像を使用し、電車内の風景を居心地の良いアメリカンレトロなダイナーのカウンター席へと完全に置き換えてください。人物、窓の反射、魔法瓶、本、その他すべての電車に関連する要素を削除します。温かみのあるタングステン照明、木目調の壁、ステンレス製のオープンキッチン、カウンター上の調味料ボトルと金属製のナプキンホルダー、そして上部に設置された大きな黒いレターボードメニューを備えた、ダイナーのサービスカウンターの正面ワイドショットを作成してください。メニューには「BREAKFAST」「GRIDDLE」「SANDWICHES」「SIDES」「DRINKS」「DAILY SPECIAL」とラベル付けされた6つのセクションを設けてください。以下の項目と価格を正確に記載してください。BREAKFAST（5項目）：TWO EGGS TOAST 4.95、BACON & EGGS 6.50、HAM & EGGS 6.75、OMELET 7.25、BISCUITS & GRAVY 5.50。GRIDDLE（4項目）：SHORT STACK 4.25、PANCAKES 5.25、FRENCH TOAST 5.75、WAFFLE 5.95。SANDWICHES（5項目）：BLT 5.50、TUNA MELT 6.25、GRILLED CHEESE 4.50、CLUB SANDWICH 7.50、HAMBURGER 6.00。SIDES（5項目）：HASH BROWNS 2.50、BACON 2.95、SAUSAGE 2.95、TOAST 1.50、PIE 3.25。DRINKS（5項目）：COFFEE 1.25、TEA 1.25、MILK 1.50、ORANGE JUICE 1.75、SODA 1.50。DAILY SPECIAL（1項目）：CHICKEN FRIED STEAK 8.25。人物は含めず、ノスタルジックで清潔感のある構図の、リアルな写真のような仕上がりにしてください。
promptTranslations.ko: 제공된 참조 이미지를 사용하여 기차 내부 장면을 아늑한 빈티지 미국식 다이너 카운터 내부로 완전히 교체하세요. 사람, 창문 반사, 보온병, 책 및 모든 기차 요소를 제거하세요. 따뜻한 텅스텐 조명, 나무 패널 벽, 스테인리스 스틸 오픈 키친, 카운터 위의 조미료 병과 금속 냅킨 디스펜서, 그리고 위에 설치된 커다란 검은색 메뉴판이 있는 다이너 서비스 카운터를 정면 와이드 샷으로 만드세요. 메뉴판에는 BREAKFAST, GRIDDLE, SANDWICHES, SIDES, DRINKS, DAILY SPECIAL이라는 6개의 섹션이 있어야 합니다. 다음 항목과 가격을 정확히 포함하세요: BREAKFAST에는 5개 항목: TWO EGGS TOAST 4.95, BACON & EGGS 6.50, HAM & EGGS 6.75, OMELET 7.25, BISCUITS & GRAVY 5.50. GRIDDLE에는 4개 항목: SHORT STACK 4.25, PANCAKES 5.25, FRENCH TOAST 5.75, WAFFLE 5.95. SANDWICHES에는 5개 항목: BLT 5.50, TUNA MELT 6.25, GRILLED CHEESE 4.50, CLUB SANDWICH 7.50, HAMBURGER 6.00. SIDES에는 5개 항목: HASH BROWNS 2.50, BACON 2.95, SAUSAGE 2.95, TOAST 1.50, PIE 3.25. DRINKS에는 5개 항목: COFFEE 1.25, TEA 1.25, MILK 1.50, ORANGE JUICE 1.75, SODA 1.50. DAILY SPECIAL에는 1개 항목: CHICKEN FRIED STEAK 8.25. 사실적인 사진처럼 보이게 하고, 약간의 향수를 불러일으키며, 깔끔한 구도로 구성하세요. 사람은 포함하지 마세요.
